RFID Tags

At the heart of OpenSpool are the NFC/RFID tags that you will place on every spool you wa= nt to automate. The OpenSpool hardware works with a wide variety of High-Fr= equency tags (13.56Mhz)

NFC vs RFI= D

NFC is= to RFID like <= code class=3D"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge">Bluetooth is to = Radio.
All = NFC Tags are RFID tags, but not all RFID tags are NFC tags.

Tag Selection

Purchase NTAG 215 or 216

NTAG 215 - Amazon
NTAG 215 - Aliexpress

=
=E2=9C=85
Tag Bytes Supported
NTAG 213 14= 4 bytes =E2=9D=8C
NTAG 215 504 bytes<= /td> =E2=9C=85
NTAG 216 888 bytes

Protocol

OpenSpool NFC= tags create an NDEF message on the tag. NDEF messages are human readable a= nd can be viewed from your phone.

iPhone - NFC Tools app
Android - NFC Tools app

= The NDEF message is a single record of type application/json

{
    "protocol": "openspool",
    "version": "1.0",
    "type": "PLA",
    "color_hex":<=
span class=3D"w"> "FFAABB",
    "brand": "Generic",=

    "min_temp": "220",<=
/span>
    "max_temp": "240"
}

color_hex =3D 6 digit hex color. For best re= sults it needs to be one of the predefined values in bambu slicer.
= type =3D One of= the predf= ined values in bambu slicer.
brand =3D One of Generic, Overture PolyLite, = eSun, PolyTerra= . The full list can be found in bambuslicer= . If a filament is defined that is not in this list, it will be assumed to = be Generic.

=

.highlight .gi { color: rgb(166, 226, 46); } html { line-height: 1.15; text-size-adjust: 100%; } body { margin: 0px; } main { display: block; } h1 { font-size: 2em; margin: 0.67em 0px; } hr { box-sizing: content-box; height: 0px; overflow: visible; } pre { font-family: monospace; font-size: 1em; } a { background-color: transparent; } abbr[title] { border-bottom-width: medium; border-bottom-style: none; borde= r-bottom-color: currentcolor; text-decoration: underline dotted; } b, strong { font-weight: bolder; } code, kbd, samp { font-family: monospace; font-size: 1em; } small { font-size: 80%; } sub, sup { font-size: 75%; line-height: 0; position: relative; vertical-ali= gn: baseline; } sub { bottom: -0.25em; } sup { top: -0.5em; } img { border-style: none; } button, input, optgroup, select, textarea { font-family: inherit; font-size= : 100%; line-height: 1.15; margin: 0px; } button, input { overflow: visible; } button, select { text-transform: none; } button, [type=3D"button"], [type=3D"reset"], [type=3D"submit"] { appearance= : button; } fieldset { padding: 0.35em 0.75em 0.625em; } legend { box-sizing: border-box; color: inherit; display: table; max-width:= 100%; padding: 0px; white-space: normal; } progress { vertical-align: baseline; } textarea { overflow: auto; } [type=3D"checkbox"], [type=3D"radio"] { box-sizing: border-box; padding: 0p= x; } [type=3D"number"]::-webkit-inner-spin-button, [type=3D"number"]::-webkit-ou= ter-spin-button { height: auto; } [type=3D"search"] { appearance: textfield; outline-offset: -2px; } [type=3D"search"]::-webkit-search-decoration { appearance: none; } ::-webkit-file-upload-button { appearance: button; font: inherit; } details { display: block; } summary { display: list-item; } template { display: none; } [hidden] { display: none; } :root { color-scheme: dark; } * { box-sizing: border-box; } html { scroll-behavior: smooth; } html { font-size: 0.875rem !important; } @media (min-width: 31.25rem) { html { font-size: 1rem !important; } } body { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, blinkmacsystemfont, "Segoe UI= ", roboto, "Helvetica Neue", arial, sans-serif, "Segoe UI { margin-top: 1em; margin-bottom: 1em; } a { color: rgb(44, 132, 250); text-decoration: none; } a:not([class]) { text-decoration: underline rgb(68, 67, 77); text-underline= -offset: 2px; } a:not([class]):hover { text-decoration-color: rgba(44, 132, 250, 0.45); } code { font-family: SFMono-Regular, menlo, consolas, monospace; font-size: = 0.75em; line-height: 1.4; } figure, pre { margin: 0px; } li { margin: 0.25em 0px; } img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; } hr { height: 1px; padding: 0px; margin: 2rem 0px; background-color: rgb(68,= 67, 77); border: 0px; } blockquote { margin: 10px 0px; margin-block-start: 0px; margin-inline-start= : 0px; padding-left: 1rem; border-left: 3px solid rgb(68, 67, 77); } .side-bar { z-index: 0; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; background-color: r= gb(39, 38, 43); } @media (min-width: 50rem) { .side-bar { flex-flow: column; position: fixed; width: 15.5rem; height: 1= 00%; border-right: 1px solid rgb(68, 67, 77); align-items: flex-end; } } @media (min-width: 66.5rem) { .side-bar { width: calc(50% - 16.75rem); min-width: 16.5rem; } } @media (min-width: 50rem) { .side-bar + .main { margin-left: 15.5rem; } } @media (min-width: 66.5rem) {
